hero_layout: stacked cinematic — big fullscreen text with scroll cue
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: sticky top — visible but scrolls into view
card_style: hover-to-reveal — minimal at rest, details on hover
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
cursor_effect: magnetic effect — buttons slightly attract cursor on hover
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
quirk: project cards are arranged in a diagonal / staggered grid
